subject: Podium-style top 3 leaderboard visualization on Community page
description: GoFundMe's community leaderboard uses a playful podium layout (1st center-tall, 2nd left, 3rd right) with colored background cards. Consider adding this as a visual hero above the current flat ranked list, showing top 3 with larger avatars, colored cards (gold/silver/bronze tints), and raised amounts prominently. The existing flat list stays below for ranks 4+. This is the most gamified element on their community page and would add visual punch.

changes: Podium layout for top 3: 2nd-1st-3rd order, gold/silver/bronze card tints
Crown icon on #1, larger avatar, first name only for compact display
Rank 4+ remains as flat list below podium
